name: Ascenda WF-09: Growth Trigger & Expansion Analysis

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 1500, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Analyze expansion opportunities for ' + $json.brandName + ' after successful Sam\'s Club roadshow. ROI: ' + $json.roi + '%. Revenue: $' + $json.totalRevenue + '. Units sold: ' + $json.unitsSold + '. Category: ' + $json.category + '. Consider: 1) Additional Sam\'s Club locations (scaling from current clubs), 2) Costco crossover potential, 3) Puerto Rico / mainland expansion, 4) Seasonal optimization (Q1-Q4 strategy), 5) Program graduation (from Pop-Up to permanent shelf). Recommend: Primary expansion path, Timeline (30/60/90 day), Capital requirements, Expected ROI at scale. Be specific with numbers.' }] }) }}

parameters.subject: =Growth Opportunity: {{ $json.brandName }} (ROI: {{ $json.roi }}%)
parameters.message:
=

Expansion Analysis: {{ $json.brandName }}

Post-Show ROI: {{ $json.roi }}% | Revenue: ${{ $json.totalRevenue }} | Units: {{ $json.unitsSold }}

{{ $json.expansionAnalysis }}

Next Steps:

  • Review expansion recommendations
  • Schedule buyer follow-up meeting
  • Prepare 2026 roadmap alignment proposal
  • Evaluate SPV reinvestment structure if scaling

meta.description: Growth analysis and expansion planning. Triggered by successful roadshow (ROI >= 20%). Generates AI expansion analysis covering additional clubs, Costco crossover, seasonal strategy.
